name: rapp-batcave
notes: The Batcave — standalone private cubby neighborhood (private-workspace pattern). Each member's cubby houses their full rapp estate, isolated. Per CONSTITUTION Article XLVI this rappid is the permanent global address. Article XXXIV.1 locks the STRING FORMAT (Eternity `rappid:@<owner>/<slug>:<64hex>`); the 64hex here is the deterministic sha256 of 'kody-w/rapp-batcave' — the same self-locating neighborhood-mint convention rapp-commons uses, upgraded to full 256-bit. Membership = GitHub collaborator status on this repo.
